_meta.name: Institutional Archive Targets
_meta.notes: Catalog and archive endpoints that are likely to help extend Project Parva's historical holiday source pool toward 2000 BS.

sources.notes: Primary National Archives portal for archival discovery and document requests. Direct curl access was unstable during the 2026-04-03 harvest pass.
Digital repository with digitized archival and government publications. The site exposes a tokenized DSpace REST API namespace and searchable collection endpoints.
Tokenized DSpace discover endpoint confirmed live during harvesting. Useful for scoped metadata search across collections.
National Archives Publications collection named 'अभिलेख (Abhilekha)'. Candidate place to search for Rajpatra-like publications.
Nepali Language Collections endpoint. Candidate place to search for Nepali calendar and Panchang material.

National library catalog that may surface Rashtriya Panchang and related historical publications. HTTPS certificate mismatch was encountered during automated harvesting; browser/manual verification may be needed.

MPP monograph catalog indexed by search engines and observed to contain Nepali 'पात्रो' records. Direct bulk curl access triggered ModSecurity during harvesting, so targeted browser or indexed-page retrieval may work better.
